text.label: Just text
text.desc: The text to display in the bar

fortune.label: Fortune mode
fortune.desc: Show a random quote from fortune instead of custom text

fortuneCategory.label: Category
fortuneCategory.desc: Limit quotes to a specific fortune category (e.g. computers, science)

fortuneOffensive.label: Include offensive (-o)
fortuneOffensive.desc: Also draw from the offensive fortune database

fortuneEqual.label: Equal probability (-e)
fortuneEqual.desc: Give all categories equal chance regardless of their size

list.label: List mode
list.desc: Show a random entry from a text file instead of custom text

textFile.label: Text file
textFile.desc: Path to a text file with one entry per line. See examples.txt for a starting point.
